message:
style: improve panic messages with context across error, extensions, and provider_metadata tests

Replace bare `.unwrap_or_else(|| panic!())` calls with descriptive
.expect() or .unwrap_or_else(|| panic!("message")) throughout test
modules for better failure diagnostics:

- src/error.rs: 5 auth_diagnostic() calls
- src/extensions.rs: 1 host_call.start event lookup
- src/provider_metadata.rs: ~25 provider_metadata() and
  provider_routing_defaults() calls across all provider batch tests

No logic changes — same assertions, better panic messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
